evals.prompt: 我有个后端服务器 10.1.1.5 要打补丁，帮我把它从 prod-pool 摘掉，等维护完再挂回来
evals.expected_output: Should use pool member disable for graceful drain, show analytics to confirm connections drained, then after maintenance use pool member enable and verify health status

evals.prompt: AKO 好像挂了，开发说他们的 Ingress 创建了但是没有对应的 VS，帮我排查一下
evals.expected_output: Should follow AKO troubleshooting workflow: check AKO pod status, check logs, validate ingress annotations, check sync status between K8s and Controller, suggest specific fix

evals.prompt: 帮我检查一下所有 SSL 证书还有多久过期，30 天内的列出来
evals.expected_output: Should use ssl expiry check with --days 30 flag, list certificates with expiry dates and associated virtual services
